## What happened?

Paste the agent answer or summarize it.

## What was unclear or risky?

- [ ] Too much jargon
- [ ] Missing next step
- [ ] Missing success check
- [ ] Risky action without confirmation
- [ ] Condescending tone
- [ ] Too long
- [ ] Too vague
- [ ] Other

## What would a better answer say?

Write a short better version if you can.

## Language

Which language was the conversation in?
